name: Inventec Besta Co.,Ltd
summary: Inventec Besta Co.,Ltd engages in the design, research, development, manufacture, and sale of electronic and electrical dictionaries under the Besta brand. The company offers digital learning products, including computer and cloud dictionaries; digital life products, such as digital recorders, digital peripheries, driving recorders, power banks, tablets, and smart health products; and toddler learning products, including baby reading machines and picture books. It also engages in the cloud business, as well as investment management activities. Inventec Besta Co.,Ltd operates in Taiwan, Japan, China, Singapore, Malaysia, Mexico, and internationally. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
